title: iodanthus dentatus
intro: Iodanthus dentatus, also known as Seaside Forget-Me-Not, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iodanthus dentatus include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Iodanthus dentatus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
